task_completion.description: The agent logs into DHIS2 (admin/district) and navigates to the Maintenance app, specifically to the Indicator management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the DHIS2 Maintenance app open in Firefox, showing the Indicator section or the indicator creation/list page.

task_completion.description: The agent creates an indicator named 'ANC 4th Visit Completion Rate (%)' (or similar containing 'ANC' and 'Completion' or 'Coverage') with the 'Per cent' indicator type selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the indicator creation form with the name filled in, and 'Per cent' selected as the indicator type. The indicator should be saved (success message or visible in list).

task_completion.description: The agent opens the expression editor for both numerator and denominator of the ANC indicator. The numerator should reference 'ANC 4th or more visits' and the denominator should reference 'ANC 1st visit' data elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the expression editor dialog open, showing data element search/selection. Evidence that 'ANC 4th visit' was searched for and inserted in the numerator, and 'ANC 1st visit' for the denominator. The expression should show #{...} syntax.

task_completion.description: The agent creates a second indicator named 'Penta1-Penta3 Dropout Rate (%)' (or similar containing 'Dropout' and 'Penta') with the 'Per cent' indicator type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a second indicator being created in the Maintenance app with the appropriate name and Percentage type.

task_completion.description: The agent configures the dropout indicator's numerator with a SUBTRACTION formula: (Penta1 doses given - Penta3 doses given). This requires searching for both data elements in the expression editor and typing a minus sign between them.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the expression editor showing a formula with two data element references separated by a minus sign. Evidence of searching for 'Penta1' and 'Penta3' data elements. The expression should look like #{...} - #{...} in the formula textarea.

task_completion.description: The agent creates a legend set named 'RMNCAH Performance' with three tiers/items: Red (0-50), Yellow (50-80), Green (80-100) with appropriate colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the legend set creation form in Maintenance showing three legend items with start/end values of 0-50, 50-80, 80-100 and distinct colors (red, yellow, green).

task_completion.description: The agent creates a pivot table in Data Visualizer named 'RMNCAH District Scorecard Q4 2025' showing both indicators for all districts, October-December 2025, with the RMNCAH Performance legend applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Data Visualizer app showing a pivot table with district names in rows, indicator values in columns, period set to Q4 2025 or Oct-Dec 2025. The legend should be applied (colored cells). The visualization title should contain 'RMNCAH' and 'Scorecard'.

task_completion.description: The agent creates a dashboard named 'RMNCAH Scorecard Dashboard 2025' and adds the scorecard pivot table to it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Dashboard app showing a new dashboard with the RMNCAH name, containing at least one visualization item (the scorecard pivot table).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual DHIS2 web interface throughout the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the DHIS2 web application in Firefox browser, not a text editor, terminal, or mockup.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface rather than terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands or Python scripts interacting with the DHIS2 API.

integrity.description: The agent used the DHIS2 expression editor dialog to configure indicator formulas, not manual UID typing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the expression editor dialog with data element search and selection, not raw UID strings typed directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: This task requires creating 5 DHIS2 objects in sequence: (1) an ANC indicator with numerator='ANC 4th or more visits' (id:hfdmMSPBgLG), denominator='ANC 1st visit' (id:fbfJHSPpUQD), (2) a dropout indicator with numerator=('Penta1 doses given' minus 'Penta3 doses given'), denominator='Penta1 doses given', both using the 'Per cent' indicator type (factor 100, id:bWuNrMHEoZ0), (3) a legend set 'RMNCAH Performance' with Red 0-50 / Yellow 50-80 / Green 80-100, (4) a pivot table 'RMNCAH District Scorecard Q4 2025' with both indicators, all districts, Q4 2025, legend applied, and (5) a dashboard 'RMNCAH Scorecard Dashboard 2025' containing the pivot table. The HARDEST part is the dropout indicator numerator which requires a subtraction in the expression editor: searching for 'Penta1 doses given', inserting it, typing ' - ', then searching for 'Penta3 doses given' and inserting it. The expression should look like #{fClA2Erf6IO.HllvX50cXC0} - #{n6aMJNLdvep.HllvX50cXC0}.
